prompt: A high-angle interior shot of a modern living room featuring a black leather sofa with two throw pillows, one displaying a white and black geometric maze pattern and the other embroidered with white bamboo leaves on black fabric. In front of the sofa is a round glass-top coffee table with a black sculptural base, holding a white ceramic vase containing three white orchid stems and a small black abstract ring sculpture. To the left stands a low cabinet in dark wood with rattan accents, topped with two framed portraits; the larger frame shows a woman with short black hair wearing a red top against a light background, while a smaller portrait sits beside it. Behind the sofa is a three-panel folding screen depicting silhouettes of palm trees and foliage on a warm beige background. Above the screen is a floor lamp with a cylindrical off-white shade and dark metal base. The walls are painted cream, adorned with circular wall art showing a white flower and a rectangular frame containing bamboo illustrations. A woven rug covers the floor, and a chandelier with multiple spherical glass shades hangs from the ceiling. Soft natural light filters through sheer curtains on the left.

A mirror selfie taken by an Asian woman with long dark hair, standing indoors in a yoga studio. She is wearing a light purple sports bra and high-waisted grey leggings. In her right hand, she holds a white smartphone with a triple camera module, obscuring her face. On her left wrist, she wears a black smartwatch; on her right wrist, a gold bracelet. A silver necklace is visible around her neck. The background features a wooden floor with a herringbone pattern and grey yoga mats. Behind her are shelves filled with pink exercise balls and blue aerial yoga hammocks hanging from the ceiling. On the wall to the left is a large red feather decal. In the bottom right corner, there is a cartoon-style illustration of a woman in a yoga pose. The text """"is displayed on the floor mat in the foreground.

Close-up photograph of two female hands displaying an intricate manicure design against a soft-focus background. The nails are long and shaped into an oval almond style with a glossy finish. The color scheme is a gradient of nude to light pastel pink. Several accent nails feature hand-painted white flower designs resembling cherry blossoms or peonies with translucent petals and visible texture lines. Specific nails are adorned with small, round, clear rhinestone gems positioned at the center of the flowers and along the edges. The skin tone is fair with natural pores and cuticle details visible. Lighting is bright and soft, creating a gentle sheen on the nail polish surface. High resolution, macro photography style, sharp focus on the fingertips.

A high-resolution product photography shot of a silver star-themed bracelet resting on a solid, matte light blue background. The bracelet is composed of a series of smooth, spherical silver beads and three distinct charms: two large, five-pointed stars and one smaller star. The surface of the stars is highly polished and reflective, contrasting with the textured, dimpled finish of the spacer beads located between them. The bracelet features an adjustable chain closure mechanism consisting of a ring extender and a small heart-shaped safety clasp at the top. The lighting is soft and diffuse, creating gentle specular highlights on the metallic surfaces and casting subtle shadows to emphasize the three-dimensional form. The composition is centered, capturing the jewelry from a slightly elevated angle to clearly display the arrangement of the charms and beads.

A close-up portrait of an East Asian woman with long black hair and fair skin, lying down with her head tilted back towards the upper left corner. She is wearing a red garment. Her eyes are closed, and she has a peaceful expression. Strong sunlight streams in from the top right, backlighting her face and creating a halo effect around her hair strands. The background consists of a wooden window frame at the top and a blurred indoor setting with soft beige walls. Soft focus, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, high detail.

A high-angle close-up product photography of a beaded necklace resting on a dark charcoal gray textured fabric background with fine diagonal weave lines and subtle creases. The necklace consists of a continuous string of round beads varying in shades of emerald green, jade green, light mint green, and pale white. Interspersed among the green beads are smooth pink cylindrical spacer beads and small polished silver metallic balls that reflect the studio lighting. Suspended from the beaded chain are three distinct flower-shaped charms made of glossy pink material with five petals each. The two upper flowers feature intricate detailing with a central round clear faceted gemstone surrounded by smaller crystals, while the single lower pendant is a larger flower charm with a similar central crystal cluster. The lighting is soft and diffused from above, casting gentle highlights on the curved surfaces of the beads and the metallic components, creating realistic depth against the dark background. The composition focuses entirely on the jewelry item, filling the frame with the curve of the necklace.

A high-angle, realistic landscape shot of a tranquil coastal harbor bathed in golden hour sunlight. The sky is a clear gradient of azure blue fading to pale white at the horizon. In the immediate foreground, calm deep blue water reflects the boats above with slight ripples. A small wooden boat with a bright yellow hull and red trim floats on the left edge. Center-left features a white cabin cruiser with a green canvas cover tied to an orange spherical buoy. To its right is another white fishing boat with a teal stripe along the gunwale. Dominating the lower center is a white rowboat with a vivid blue interior, tethered by a rope to a large orange buoy. Further back, a white motor yacht and several other small white vessels are moored near a stone pier. The background consists of a lush green hillside densely packed with trees, including palms, rising steeply from the water's edge. A yellow house with a red roof and white window frames stands on the left bank, while a white house with a red roof sits on the right. A low concrete bridge spans the channel connecting the banks. The lighting creates soft highlights on the water and warm tones on the buildings.

A close-up, eye-level shot inside a high-end Japanese sushi restaurant, featuring a chef standing behind a light-colored wooden counter. The chef is wearing a white traditional chef's jacket with colorful floral embroidery on the chest and sleeves, a white apron tied at the waist, and transparent disposable gloves. The chef is holding wooden chopsticks in their right hand, actively using them to pick up food from a round bamboo steamer basket lined with white parchment paper; the basket contains white liquid and dark ingredients. To the right of the steamer is a dark brown ceramic bowl filled with crushed ice, topped with raw salmon sashimi slices and bright orange crab legs, garnished with green shiso leaves and a green wasabi mound. In the foreground on a lower tier of the counter sits a round white plate containing a fresh salad composed of mixed greens, yellow corn kernels, shredded carrots, red tomato wedges, and small green peas. To the right of the bowl is a black ceramic warmer with vertical gold calligraphy text reading "すし ちくわ" positioned on its side surface. A red lacquerware cup sits on a tray to the far left. The lighting is soft and warm, highlighting the textures of the wood, food, and ceramics, creating an authentic culinary atmosphere.

A portrait of a young woman with long, wavy red hair standing outdoors against a background of dense green foliage. She has fair skin with visible freckles across her nose and cheeks, wearing subtle natural makeup with a nude lip color. Her eyes are light-colored and she is looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression. She is dressed in a structured brown blazer over a white top. The lighting is warm and directional, simulating late afternoon sun filtering through leaves, creating bright highlights on her hair and face while casting soft shadows. The composition is a medium shot from the waist up. High detail focus on the texture of the wool coat, individual strands of hair, and skin pores. Photorealistic style, 85mm lens, f/1. 8 aperture, shallow depth of field, natural bokeh.

A narrow Venetian canal scene viewed from a low angle near the water surface, featuring a black gondola moving away from the viewer towards the center of the frame. A gondolier stands at the stern, wearing a striped navy and white shirt, black trousers, and a dark cap, holding an oar in his right hand against the wooden side of the boat. The canal walls are lined with multi-story buildings painted in warm terracotta, salmon pink, ochre yellow, and beige tones, exhibiting weathered plaster textures and patches of exposed brickwork near the waterline. Several windows with dark shutters are visible on the facades. In the background, a small stone arch bridge spans the canal further down. The water surface is dark and rippled, reflecting the golden light of the sun and the colorful buildings above. The lighting indicates late afternoon or early morning with soft shadows cast by the buildings onto the water.
